narrative: USD mixed as US and Iran negotiation teams set to return to talks — EUR/USD firms at 1.1783 on easing geopolitical tensions; USD/JPY pressured at 159.04. Gold higher +0.62% on safe-haven demand, while equities rise +1.02% and VIX at 18.7. AUD/USD holds near 0.7096 as RBA warns of inflation and growth concerns.
